explicitReviewPoints: Broader API commitments require explicit review.

commands.summary: Show npm-first CLI help and optional-surface readiness gates.
Show the credential-free onboarding wizard and local config readiness.
Inspect the local config file without contacting Reclaim.
Compare shipped and roadmap surfaces against the published OpenAPI document.
Generate a redacted support bundle for preview or config incidents.
Run an authenticated health check against a configured Reclaim API endpoint.
List task-assignment time policies from a configured account.
Explain policy fit for synthetic task, focus, buffer, and hours previews.
Exercise the toolkit against the synthetic mock API surface.
Preview task create payloads from synthetic input fixtures.
Compose a synthetic weekly agenda from task, habit, focus, buffer, and meeting preview fixtures.
commands.readinessGate: This weekly composer intentionally stays local-preview only until a separate public review accepts any broader live scheduling contract.

commands.summary: Read tasks from a configured account.
Read and filter tasks from a configured account.
Export read-only task results as JSON or CSV content inside JSON output.
Preview duplicate risk before any task write.
Create tasks after explicit write confirmation.
Validate prior task write receipts against the configured account.
Delete reviewed duplicate tasks after explicit confirmation.
Preview habit payloads from synthetic input fixtures.
commands.readinessGate: Habit field mapping still needs a bounded review against the generated OpenAPI contract before any live write helper.

commands.summary: Preview focus-block payloads from synthetic input fixtures.
commands.readinessGate: No reviewed public API-shape evidence has been accepted for Focus create writes.

commands.summary: Preview buffer payloads from synthetic input fixtures.
commands.readinessGate: Buffer write behavior remains unproven because public anchor and placement semantics are not yet reviewed.

commands.summary: Preview buffer rule diffs from synthetic rules and optional current buffers.
commands.readinessGate: Rule previews stay synthetic until Buffer write semantics are proven publicly.

commands.summary: Expand buffer templates into synthetic preview payloads.
commands.readinessGate: Template expansion remains preview-only because downstream Buffer writes are not yet approved.

commands.summary: Simulate candidate meeting slots from synthetic availability fixtures.
commands.readinessGate: Scheduling helpers stay preview-only until a separate public-safe routing review approves any live meeting write path.

commands.summary: Simulate recurring meeting move suggestions from synthetic fixtures.
commands.readinessGate: Recurring meeting reschedule stays synthetic because live calendar mutation and fallback routing remain out of bounds.

commands.summary: Inspect synthetic meetings-and-hours snapshots without live account reads.
commands.readinessGate: Hours-related helpers remain read-only or preview-only until a separate scheduling review approves a narrow public write contract.

commands.summary: Preview hours preset switches from synthetic snapshots.
commands.readinessGate: Hours switching is intentionally blocked from live writes pending separate scheduling-surface approval.

commands.summary: Inspect synthetic hours-configuration snapshots as summary-only coverage and window counts.
commands.readinessGate: This summary-only hours-config audit is public-safe because it returns coverage and window counts instead of policy ids, titles, or meeting details.

commands.summary: Compare two synthetic hours-configuration snapshots using source handles only.
commands.readinessGate: This diff digest stays public-safe because it compares summary-only hours-config signals keyed by source handles instead of replaying private policy details.

commands.summary: Read meetings and hours summaries from a configured account.
commands.readinessGate: This surface stays read-only; live hours mutation is not approved in the public toolkit.

commands.summary: Read a summary-only hours-configuration audit from a configured account.
commands.readinessGate: This authenticated audit surface is intentionally limited to hours-config coverage and window counts.

commands.summary: Inspect synthetic account snapshots as counts and capability coverage only.
commands.readinessGate: This summary-only audit surface is already public-safe because it returns counts and capability coverage instead of private object details.

commands.summary: Compare two synthetic account snapshots and classify summary-only drift.
commands.readinessGate: This drift digest stays public-safe because it compares summary-only snapshot signals and source handles instead of private object details.

commands.summary: Read a summary-only account audit from a configured account.
commands.readinessGate: This authenticated audit surface is intentionally limited to counts and capability coverage.
